node.data: {"M8376":{"lit":"ձախա<lb xml:id=\"l104247092\" facs=\"#z104247092\" n=\"10\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>կողմեան","line":{"facs":"#z104247091","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104247091","n":"9"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"8376-096a"},"n":"ձախակողմեան"},"M36":{"lit":"ձախակողմեան","context":"text/body/ab[147]","n":"ձախակողմեան"},"M3078":{"lit":"ձախակողմ<lb xml:id=\"l103982830\" facs=\"#z103982830\" n=\"13\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>եան","line":{"facs":"#z103982829","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l103982829","n":"12"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"3078-083b"},"n":"ձախակողմեան"}}
